title: Bilo-Bilo with Ginataang
description: A traditional Filipino dessert made with rice cakes, coconut milk, and sweetened with sugar. This recipe combines the classic flavors with a refreshing twist.
instructions: Combine water and sugar in a saucepan. Heat over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Add coconut milk, ginataang, and sweetened condensed milk. Cook until mixture thickens.
Add rice cakes (bilo-bilo) to the saucepan. Cook for about 5 minutes or until they absorb the mixture.
Add bitter melon seeds and stir well. Cook for another minute.
Remove saucepan from heat. If desired, add a few drops of food coloring to tint the dessert.
Transfer the dessert to individual serving bowls or a large serving dish.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
